reason: Successfully navigated to agent, verified status, sent math question, and received correct response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface and sidebar showing three agents
Clicked "QA-20260424-204325-y1n4" agent in sidebar - Agent page loaded, showing idle status
Verified agent status - Status indicator shows "idle" (acceptable per requirements)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input - Message entered successfully
Clicked "Send message" button - Message sent, new session "Basic Math Question Session" created, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response - Agent responded in 4 seconds
Verified response mentions "4" - Response clearly shows "4" as the answer
Took final screenshot - Screenshot saved showing conversation with user question and agent's correct response
